title: Switzerland is voting on whether to cap its population at 10 million. Here's what to know
summary_full: Switzerland votes on a population cap that could tighten immigration and put its EU free-movement agreement under pressure.
summary_public: Switzerland votes on a population cap that could tighten immigration and put its EU free-movement agreement under pressure.
